children.text: Dude ze ship just broke. Do something.
Stop stalling!!!!
FYI your drowning
Buddy, get to in ze cannon on the upper deck
if ur wondering "where are the life boats?" Remember fella zis was in like ze 1500s life boats aren't invented yet
you have discovered St Kitts and Nevis
u found the cannon!!! Its old and doesn't work well. Better then drowning
Wait, why is there a dinosaur here?
Beanstalk time!!
Entering partal
Ahoy, matey!! Today your goal is to find ze treasure of ze chest
But first...
You have found the chest but the key still lies unknown
FYI the key is the gravity block thingy
welcome to the mariana trench. u dies from water pressure
Watch out for spiky coral
jump on the fish to survive
you have found the key!!!
dont jump
now you can jump
dodge the checkpoint
